name: Frozen Teahouse Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald the milk and water together.
2. Add the tea and cloves to the mixture, steep for 3 minutes, then strain.
3. Beat the egg yolks with 1 cup of sugar and salt until combined.
4. Gradually add the strained milk mixture while stirring constantly over boiling water.
5. Cook until thickened.
6. Cool the mixture.
7. Stir in lemon juice and rind.
8. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
9. Add the remaining sugar to the beaten whites and mix well.
10. Whip the heavy cream until it holds soft peaks.
11. Gently fold the whipped egg whites and cream into the chilled mixture.
12. Pour the batter into a freezing tray or container and place in the refrigerator to set until firm.
